features.description: Server-side ad-network conversion event forwarder. Captures business milestones + dispatches to configured providers.
Advanced provider set. Small tenants get Meta / Google Ads / GA4 / Custom Webhook. Medium+ unlock LinkedIn Insight, Snapchat CAPI, Pinterest CAPI, GTM Server.
Generic HMAC-signed JSON webhook driver. Escape hatch for tenants using Segment / Rudderstack / custom analytics warehouses.
Return on Ad Spend dashboard aggregated by campaign / source / medium. Medium+ tier.
Replay individual dead-lettered events after the retry budget is exhausted. Enterprise-only.
Send synthetic test events via provider sandbox endpoints. Used for tenant onboarding + credential rotation validation.
Compliance surface: view events + deliveries suppressed by consent over a date range.

Route MarketingProviderCircuitBreakerOpened + MarketingDeadLetterCreated notifications to a tenant Slack channel. Enterprise-only; requires the tenant to have configured a Slack integration in the notifications module.
Extends marketing_events retention from 7 years (default) to 10 years. Enterprise-only. For finance regimes that require longer ad-spend audit trails.
